heading: Suite 10 — Klein Windhoek
description: Premium accommodation for energy professionals. A two-bedroom executive apartment designed for consultants and project professionals requiring extended stays in Windhoek.

features.title: Executive Living
features.description: Fully equipped environments with private work areas and housekeeping, with flexible terms from one month upwards.

features.title: Prime Location
features.description: In Klein Windhoek's professional area, near energy sector offices, with easy access to Windhoek CBD.

features.title: Executive Transport
features.description: On-demand transport for site visits, crew rotation, and stakeholder engagements with professional drivers.
